invariant_set.verification: TUI widgets do not allow code editing; operator interacts via commands and read-only reports
Model config in subagent-config.json; no hardcoded model strings in extension code

invariant_set.text: Localization: UI and user artifacts in Russian; AI documentation in English
invariant_set.verification: Localization guard check on all markdown derivatives; English-only audit on schemas and prompts

invariant_set.text: Git commit safety: staged list, not git add -A
invariant_set.verification: Worker commits only files listed in files-to-commit.json

components.name: Task Widget
interfaces: Render: task title, step list, progress bar, subagent badges

components.name: Subagent Widget
responsibilities: Show model and domain for each

components.name: Localization Guard Integration
responsibilities: Run localization guard after each worker commit
Auto-reject review if guard fails with correction directive
interfaces: Integration point in executor loop after worker commit

components.name: Verification Matrix
responsibilities: Track invariant status across all delivery units

components.name: Subagent Config Editor
interfaces: TUI form with fields for config keys

flows.name: TUI Widget Render
steps: Executor emits event: step_started, worker_spawned, review_done
Widget listens to events via ctx.onEvent or polling
Pi TUI renders widget in sidebar or panel

flows.name: Localization Guard in Review
steps: Worker completes step and writes files-to-commit.json
If exit 0: proceed to reviewer spawn
If exit != 0: form correction WorkerSpec with guard output
Spawn correction worker -> new commit -> re-run guard
If max iter exceeded: escalate to operator

flows.name: Verification Matrix Check
steps: After each DU completion: executor reads all task.json invariants
For each invariant: check verification_method against evidence
If any critical invariant failed: block next DU, escalate

deferred_scope.name: Memory Layer (session/episodic/semantic/procedural)
deferred_scope.rationale: Deferred to v2 (TASK-2026-0002-loom-vnext). Active context management beyond passive files.

deferred_scope.name: Scout Retrieval (search_knowledge tool)
deferred_scope.rationale: Deferred to v2. Manual reading sufficient for <50 tasks.
